examples: The magazine has just published its six thousandth edition.
The light, about one thousandth of the amount needed to read by, is just a start.
You could actually draw out a 36,000-kilometer strand or ribbon of nanotubes stronger than steel, but maybe a thousandth the thickness of a human hair.
Typically, the doctors apply about a thousandth of the power that's used in a flashlight bulb.
The rem can be expressed in smaller units called millirems, which equal one one-thousandth of a rem.
